login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to your workspace
login.emailInvalid: Enter a valid email or username.

unauthorized.title: Access not allowed
unauthorized.routeMessage: This page is not available for your role. Use the button below to return to your workspace.
unauthorized.workspaceMessage: This workspace is not available for your role. Use the button below to return to your assigned area.

ui.partialData: Some data could not be loaded. Showing partial results.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.desc: An unexpected error occurred. Reload the page or try again.

nav.hrSubtitle: Workforce records · employee lifecycle · system access
nav.hrHint: Manage employee records separately from login accounts. Finance, inventory execution, and system settings are not available here.

dashboardPage.title: Dashboard
dashboardPage.subtitle: Business overview
dashboardPage.salesTrendSubtitle: Last 14 days · margin {{margin}}% · {{trend}} vs last month

pos.clearCartConfirm: Clear all items from the cart?
pos.draftInvoiceHint: Retry only if stock or validation issues are resolved.
pos.draftInvoicePost: exists in ERP but is not submitted.
pos.monitorMode: Monitor mode — checkout and shift controls are disabled.
pos.pendingClose: Shift close is pending manager approval — selling is disabled until the closing is submitted.
pos.tapOrScan: Tap a product or scan barcode
pos.viewOnly: View-only — you do not have permission to operate the register.
pos.viewReceiptHint: View receipt and print from the list.
pos.allOutOfStockDesc: Refine your search or wait for stock to be received before continuing checkout.
pos.allOutOfStockTitle: All visible items are out of stock
pos.noShiftHint: Open your drawer to start selling
pos.openingBalanceHint: Enter the cash in the drawer at the start of your shift. This is reconciled at close.
pos.shiftClosedExternally: Your shift was closed elsewhere. Open a new shift to continue selling.

shifts.subtitle: Cash reconciliation · Shift opening and closing
shifts.noPermissionOpen: You do not have permission to open shifts.
shifts.noPermissionClose: You do not have permission to close shifts.
shifts.createsOpeningEntry: Opens a new shift for cashier {{cashier}}.
shifts.noOpenShift: No open shift found for your register.
shifts.closingNeedsVariance: Shift {{name}} saved as draft — manager must approve variance (EGP {{variance}}).
shifts.closingNeedsManager: Shift {{name}} saved as draft — an accountant must approve it.
shifts.closingDraftSaved: Shift draft saved. Waiting for accountant approval.

approvals.viewOnly: View only — submit from Approvals hub
approvals.dashboardSubtitle: Pending purchases, shift closings, variance alerts, and recent history.
approvals.noPendingPurchasesDesc: Buying rates within auto-approve limits or none submitted.
approvals.noPendingShiftsDesc: All shift closings are submitted or none awaiting review.
approvals.noHistoryDesc: Decisions on goods receipts will appear here.
approvals.noRecentShifts: No recent submitted shifts in this view.
approvals.receiptApprovedNoPayable: Goods received but the supplier invoice was not created: {{message}}. Open Supplier Invoices to create it.

rejectModal.title: Reject {{kind}}
rejectModal.confirmText: Are you sure you want to reject {{kind}} {{name}}?
rejectModal.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. supplier delivered wrong quantity, price mismatch, damaged goods

inventory.subtitle: Current stock snapshot
inventory.emptyFiltered: No inventory rows match your filters.

alerts.title: Stock alerts
alerts.subtitle: Low stock and reorder-level warnings
alerts.noneDesc: Set alert thresholds on items from their detail page to monitor low stock.
alerts.subtitleItemLevel: Items at or below their item-level alert threshold

reorder.title: Reorder suggestions
reorder.subtitle: Items at or below reorder level
reorder.noneDesc: Items will appear here when their stock drops to or below their reorder level.
reorder.subtitleItemLevel: Items at or below their item-level reorder threshold

ledger.title: Stock Movement History
ledger.subtitle: Every increase and decrease in stock, by warehouse and date
ledger.emptyDesc: Use filter and click Load Movements.

reports.title: Inventory Reports
reports.subtitle: Stock balance, movement, export and print

batches.title: Batch & Expiry
batches.subtitle: Near-expiry and expired batches
batches.empty: No near-expiry batches — click Load batches

itemDetails.title: Item Details
itemDetails.subtitle: Stock, batches, and movement timeline
itemDetails.noItemDesc: Enter item code and click Load item.

thresholds.readOnly: Store Manager or Administrator can edit these thresholds.
thresholds.subtitle: Item-level alert + reorder levels. Used by the Alerts and Reorder pages.
thresholds.title: Inventory thresholds

purchasing.subtitle: Suppliers · receipts · supplier invoices
purchasing.purchaseApprovalsSubtitle: Store managers approve buying rates before stock is received.
purchasing.receiveStockSubtitle: Goods Receipt — increases warehouse stock when approved
purchasing.noInvoicesYet: No supplier invoices yet. Receive goods or create a supplier invoice to get started.
purchasing.noSuppliersDesc: Create your first supplier to start purchasing.

matching.noDraftInvoices: No draft invoices for this supplier and company.

statement.title: Supplier statement
statement.subtitle: Financial summary across all invoices and payments

dashboard.employeesDesc: Staff records — with or without login
dashboard.attendanceDesc: Daily attendance, KPIs, and bulk mark.
dashboard.payrollDesc: Generate slips, submit, and mark paid.

employees.title: Employees
employees.subtitle: Staff records
employees.emptyDesc: Create staff records here. System login is optional.
employees.emailRequiredForAccess: Work email is required to create system access

placeholder.comingSoon: This section will be available in a future release.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.subtitle: Daily attendance records and KPIs
attendance.deleteConfirm: Remove the attendance record for {{name}} on {{date}}?
attendance.emptyDesc: Try a wider date range or different filters.
attendance.noEmployeesInBranch: No active employees in this branch
attendance.hrmsMissingTitle: HR Management app is not installed.
attendance.hrmsMissingDesc: Attendance, Leave and Payroll require the `hrms` app. Run from the bench root: bench get-app hrms && bench --site SITE install-app hrms && bench --site SITE migrate

leave.title: Leave Management
leave.subtitle: Requests, approvals, and balances
leave.cancelConfirm: Cancel the leave application {{name}}? This will also clean up any linked attendance records.
leave.requireEmployeeAndType: Pick an employee and a leave type.
leave.emptyDesc: Try wider filters or submit a new request.

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.subtitle: Monthly salary slips and payroll generation
payroll.assignRequire: Pick an employee, structure and a positive base salary.
payroll.cancelConfirm: Remove slip {{name}}? Submitted slips will be cancelled first.
payroll.emptyDesc: Assign structures and generate payroll for this period.

myPayslip.title: My Payslips
myPayslip.subtitle: Your salary slips and history
myPayslip.emptyDesc: When HR generates payroll your slips will appear here.

finance.workspaceSubtitle: Approvals, payments, and reporting — no POS selling or inventory execution.
finance.workspaceHint: Scoped to your company and warehouse permissions. Stock transfers and counts are not available in this workspace.

payments.subtitle: Supplier invoices — unpaid invoices, aging, and supplier payments
payments.noInvoicesDesc: No supplier invoices match this filter.
payments.noPaymentsDesc: Submitted supplier payments will appear here.
payments.workflowDesc: Goods Receipt → Supplier Invoice → Supplier Payment

aging.title: Accounts Payable Aging
aging.subtitle: Outstanding balance by supplier and bucket — as of {{date}}.

gl.title: General Ledger
gl.subtitle: Posted accounting entries from ERPNext.
gl.empty: No ledger entries in this range
gl.emptyDesc: Adjust filters or post transactions in ERPNext.

top.title: Top Suppliers
top.subtitle: Ranked by total purchases between {{from}} and {{to}}

posProfiles.title: POS Terminals
posProfiles.subtitle: Assign warehouse and selling price list per POS terminal
posProfiles.editHint: Warehouse switching takes effect on the next POS load. Cashiers with an open shift will keep posting to the previous warehouse until they reopen the POS.
posProfiles.emptyDesc: Create POS terminals in the admin console first, then assign warehouses here.

purchHist.title: Purchasing History
purchHist.subtitle: Operational purchasing records

empty.pr: No goods receipts match these filters
empty.pi: No supplier bills match these filters

purchHist.emptyDesc: Try widening the date range or clearing the status filter.

history.title: Goods Receipt Approval History
history.subtitle: Approved and rejected goods receipts
history.emptyDesc: Try widening the date range or clearing the supplier filter.

empty.title: No documents to show
empty.desc: Choose a supplier or date range and click Load.

logoutBlocked.title: Close your shift first
logoutBlocked.message: You have an open POS shift. Please close and reconcile it before signing out — cash variance must be recorded.

itemEdit.title: Edit item
itemEdit.readOnlyHint: Read-only view — only Administrator and Store Manager can edit items.
itemEdit.hasBatch: Track by batch (enables production + expiry date per batch)
itemEdit.thresholdsSub: Alert fires when stock ≤ alert level. Reorder suggestion uses the reorder level + quantity.
itemEdit.disable: Disable this item (hides from POS, alerts, and inventory listings)
itemEdit.productInfoSub: Editable by Administrator and Store Manager.
itemEdit.pricingSub: Buying price is Administrator only. Selling price is editable by Store Manager.
itemEdit.buyingPriceAdminOnly: Only administrators can change the buying price.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: Administrator-only — every change is audited
settings.pickSectionDesc: Select a settings section from the left rail.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.help: Every change in this section is recorded with who, what, prev, new, and timestamp.
audit.emptyDesc: Changes will appear here once you edit a setting.

company.title: Company identity
company.desc: Editable fields are stored on the Company doctype. Logo upload cascades to the default Letter Head.
company.globalDesc: System-wide currency / country / fiscal year (Frappe Global Defaults).

branches.title: Branches
branches.desc: Branches are managed as Warehouses (is_group=0). User Permission rows scope users to their branch.

usersRoles.title: Users & Roles
usersRoles.desc: User CRUD lives on the dedicated users page. The capability matrix below is read-only and reflects the current backend mirror.
usersRoles.matrixDesc: Each row is a capability. Each column is a role profile. ✓ means the profile holds the capability.

products.title: Products
products.desc: Stock Settings (item naming) and Item Variant Settings.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.desc: Stock Settings (inventory side), Delivery Settings, Stock Reposting.
inventory.workspaceDesc: Transfer limits and auto-reorder defaults for this store.

finance.title: Finance
finance.desc: Accounts Settings, Buying Settings, and global POS settings.
finance.workspaceDesc: Aging buckets, AP overdue scan, and payment rules.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desc: Push notification relay and SMS gateway configuration.

printing.title: Printing
printing.desc: Print Settings, Letter Heads, and the Elmahdi print format catalog.
printing.name: Name

security.title: Security
security.desc: Session expiry, password policy, 2FA, log retention.

backup.configDesc: Auto-backup runs via the Frappe scheduler at the chosen frequency. Older backups beyond the retention window are removed.

featureFlags.title: Feature flags
featureFlags.desc: Toggle entire modules on or off. Disabled modules are hidden from navigation and their routes return 404 for non-Admin users.
featureFlags.future: Future modules can be added to the Elmahdi Settings doctype without code changes elsewhere.

settings.workspaceSubtitle: Workspace-scoped policies — every change is audited

pos.title: POS settings
pos.desc: Auto-print defaults, receipt format, and cash limits. Per-cashier overrides live on the POS Profile.
pos.profilesDesc: Per-cashier and per-branch overrides (auto-print, receipt format, MOPs) live on the POS Profile catalog.

purchasing.workspaceDesc: Purchase approval thresholds and buying policy.

hr.workspaceDesc: Standard working hours, leave notification, employee naming.
hr.catalogDesc: Leave types, holiday lists, salary components and structures are seeded by the Elmahdi installer. Edit them in Desk.

personal.title: Personal settings
personal.subtitle: Your account, your preferences. Affects only you.
personal.pickDesc: Choose a section from the left to manage your preferences.

language.title: Language
language.desc: Choose your interface language. Applies instantly to all pages and persists across devices.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desc: Controls only what you see and hear. Other users keep their own settings.
notifications.desktopHelp: Show in-app notifications when documents need your attention.
notifications.emailHelp: Also email me when an in-app notification fires.
notifications.soundHelp: Play a short sound when a notification arrives.

printing.title: Printing
printing.desc: Override the POS Profile defaults for your own receipts and prints.
printing.printerHelp: Optional — points to a Network Printer Settings record.

security.pwdMismatch: New password does not match the confirmation.
security.revokeConfirm: This session will be signed out immediately.
